waiver.reason_summary: All gate failures in this run are pre-existing on the target branch and demonstrably unrelated to the commits being pushed; the author has verified no new regressions were introduced.
waiver.detail: Manual mainline promotion for the validated code tip ab0b755c8 after rebasing to the latest origin/main. The current-tip remote-validate replay passed on the receipt-only follow-up commit, while the pre-push cert gate still fails on the pre-existing repo-intake.lv3.org cert_mismatch. A targeted live repair via playbooks/fix-edge-certificate.yml failed because Let's Encrypt CAA rechecks for matrix.lv3.org blocked issuance, and the earlier protected-branch gate on this line had already exposed existing ansible-lint debt unrelated to these commits.
substitute_evidence: make remote-validate passed on 594649d3; the only delta from validated code tip ab0b755c8 is this governed bypass receipt
uv run python scripts/validate_adr_status_transitions.py passed on the ab0b755c8 lineage
git push --dry-run origin HEAD:main reached certificate validation and failed on pre-existing repo-intake.lv3.org cert_mismatch
ansible-playbook playbooks/fix-edge-certificate.yml failed because Let's Encrypt CAA rechecks for matrix.lv3.org blocked certificate issuance
